ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "permit_category_ref" TEXT /* Reference to the category of the permit */,
  "temporary_cessation" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a temporary cessation of operations */,
  "compliance_performance_band" TEXT /* Compliance performance band assigned to the permit */,
  "billable_days" INTEGER /* Number of days billed for the permit */,
  "financial_days" INTEGER /* Number of financial days associated with the permit */,
  "charge_period" TEXT /* Charge period for the permit */,
  "permit_name" TEXT /* Name of the permit */,
  "permit_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permit */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permit expires */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body issuing the permit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated permit */,
  "expected_charge" REAL /* Expected charge for the permit */,
  "exp_baseline_charge" REAL /* Baseline expected charge if fully compliant */,
  "exp_temporary_cessation" REAL /* Expected charge reduction due to temporary cessation */,
  "exp_compliance_adjustment" REAL /* Adjustment to charge due to compliance performance */,
  "adjusted_charge" REAL /* Final charge after adjustments */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration record */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated permit */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration for adjusting expectations */,
  "exp_charge_type" TEXT /* Type of expected charge adjustment */,
  "iteration_date" TEXT /* Date when the iteration was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment record */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated permit */,
  "environment_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the environmental status (e.g., TEST, ACTIVE) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., production, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance performance record */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated permit */,
  "performance_band" TEXT /* Performance band of the compliance evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance performance was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compliance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_performance_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_periods" (
  "charge_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge period record */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated permit */,
  "charge_period" TEXT /* Description of the charge period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the charge period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the charge period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_periods_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, financial analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
